s: In 1977, Ted Cox suited up for BOS as a hitter. Key numbers: AVG 0.362, OPS 0.893, HR 1, RBI 6, WAR 0.400.
Changed teams after the previous season (BOS -> CLE).

Changed teams after the previous season (CLE -> SEA).

Changed teams after the previous season (SEA -> TOR).
